"description": "The write-time rhetorical gate's diff-scoping is ITEM-grain: every update primitive threads the WHOLE merged item into validateRhetoricalCriteriaForItems (updateItemInTypedFile block-api.ts:1537,1547-1549; upsert :1658-1660; nested :1849-1851), and the check path (checkFieldsAgainstSchema rhetorical-criteria.ts:231-286; walkNestedArrays :317-369) receives no update-key set and performs no compare-against-prior — so a status-only mutation re-asserts every budgeted field and bare-string-array element of the item against the gate's CURRENT rule set. Triggering instance: complete-task on TASK-131 refused because its acceptance_criteria, filed before the bare-string-array extension landed, carry a prior-state-narration token. Appends, removes, whole-block writes, and relation writes are unaffected; append-of-new-violator is correctly refused (the gate's purpose working at the causal write). evidence.quote: "title": "Duplicate-kind state_derivation.rollups entries are schema-expressible and make currentState diverge set-level from the invariant evaluation",

"description": "config.schema.json's state_derivation.rollups array carries no uniqueItems or per-kind uniqueness constraint, and resolveStateDerivation returns the raw config, so a config declaring the same kind in two rollup entries loads without complaint. The two consumers then disagree structurally: currentState's milestones walk visits items once PER ROLLUP ENTRY (duplicating milestones[] entries and drift-head divergence collection), while evaluateConfigInvariants builds rollupByKind as a last-wins Map and visits items ONCE. Empirically constructed during the drift-surfacing re-audit: two entries for the milestone kind yielded an 8-entry drift head against the invariant evaluation's 4 issues -- set-level divergence, not mere ordering -- and milestones[] itself duplicates under that shape. The stock catalog never ships duplicate kinds, so no shipped configuration manifests it; the divergence is reachable by any hand-authored or amended config. The ordering guarantee the drift head documents is void under this degenerate shape.",
